reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 2 (Trust Boundary): Attack path relies solely on a compromised/malicious EL sending blobs with invalid KZG proofs via Engine API. P2P path correctly enforces KZG verification (GossipBlobSidecarRequirements includes RequireSidecarKzgProofVerified), while EL path uses ELMemPoolRequirements (empty array, no verification). However, the attack requires the semi-trusted EL to be compromised, which is outside the security model per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json trust_assumptions. No untrusted (P2P) attack path exists for this issue.
